title: Hoofdstuk 16 - HTML best practices Check
description: Controleer je kennis:  Indentatie, leesbare code en HTML comments.

explanations.overview: HTML commentaren gebruiken steevast pure <!-- en -->.

explanations.overview: Comments help humans read and maintain code.
